beliefs.title: The Bible
beliefs.statement: We believe that all Scripture is verbally inspired by God (2 Timothy 3:16–17).

beliefs.title: God
beliefs.statement: We believe there is one true God who exists in three persons — Father, Son, and Holy Spirit (Matthew 28:19).

beliefs.title: Jesus Christ
beliefs.statement: We believe Jesus Christ was born of a virgin (Isaiah 7:14; Matthew 1:18–25).

beliefs.title: Salvation
beliefs.statement: We believe salvation comes through Christ's death on the cross (Romans 3:25; Hebrews 9:22).

beliefs.title: The Resurrection and Ascension
beliefs.statement: We believe Jesus rose bodily from the grave and ascended to God (Matthew 28; Mark 16).

beliefs.title: Humanity
beliefs.statement: We believe humanity is sinful and in need of a Savior (Romans 3:23).

beliefs.title: Eternal Security
beliefs.statement: We believe that faith in Jesus provides eternal security to the believer (John 10:28–29).
